name: n
description: Start a Beads work session with a fixed, minimal flow.

interface.shortDescription: Run a fixed Beads startup flow
interface.longDescription: Use N to start a Swarmies work session with minimal ambiguity: inspect the ready queue, take the first ready issue, summarize it, and claim it only on confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Run the fixed N startup flow for the next Beads task
Use bd ready, inspect the first issue, and ask whether to claim it
Start a deterministic Beads session in this repo
